tasks.description: Add property_family enum (7 families: residential, commercial, land, agricultural, hotelier, investment, project) to Property model with validation.
acceptance_criteria: Property model has property_family enum with 7 values

tasks.description: Create PROPERTY_TYPES enum set (11 basic + 41 matrix subtypes). Store subtype in metadata_json. Family-to-type mapping.
Create service catalog registry with all 13 monetized service types and FCFA prices.
Register 9 core real estate services (estimation, expertise, verification, visit, contre-visite, rental mgmt, rental listing, sales listing, publication).
Register 15 extended services (photography, video, drone, staging, renovation, construction, maintenance, cleaning, security, moving, insurance, legal, tax, condo mgmt, rent recovery).
Register 9 CRM services (lead bronze/silver/gold, coordinate unlock, premium seeker, diaspora tiers, agent business subscription).
Implement 18 residential qualification matrices with fields, question types, validation, role assignments.
Implement 7 land qualification matrices with title status, land type, zoning, surface area validation.
Implement 21 commercial qualification matrices: office, retail, warehouse, industrial, hotel, mixed-use.
Implement 5 investment qualification matrices for ROI-focused property search.
Implement 10 financing request matrices for loan/mortgage qualification.
Implement 27 professional search matrices covering all professional service categories.
Implement 24 real estate service matrices for service procurement qualification.
Implement field dictionary with role assignments per matrix field.
Implement question priority: mandatory, important, optional. Priority drives ordering.
10-step progressive qualification wizard: intent, location, type, budget, timeline, features, documents, preferences, contact, review.
Channel-adaptive qualification with configurable question limits per channel (chat/web/mobile).
Trust level 1-6 on User. OTP phone, identity docs, pro docs, professional verification, reference account.
8 badges derived from verification flags. Badge rendering system on profile.
Agent onboarding state machine: profile, training, documents, approval, activation.
Minimum 3 active agents rule. Agency operational status logic.
Agent_zones table. Lead routing by geographic zone, availability, capacity.
Lead costing module. 500 FCFA default, configurable.
Agent credits (credits, total_spent, last_recharge). Boost purchases. Campay integration.
Agent rating 1-5 FLOAT. Post-interaction collection. Weighted average.
Agency role enum: responsible, admin, agent, assistant. Role-based access.
Trust level and verification fields on Organization. Agency trust calc.
RCCM, tax_id, CNI documents on Organization. Registration form with upload.
Link 107 property types to qualification matrices. Type-family mapping with versioning.
Extend property state machine: draft, pending_review, published, reserved, under_negotiation, sold/rented, archived, deleted.
8 publication rules: required fields, photos, price, location, owner verified, agent, fee, no duplicate.
6 price concepts: price_displayed, negotiable, price_negotiable, price_suggestion, hidden_price, pricing_note.
7 price types: asking, selling, rental, monthly_charges, agency_fees, notary_fees, tax.
Data quality scoring: completeness + reliability dimensions. Score 0-100.
Per-type field schemas in metadata_json. Validation per family. Dynamic forms.
Availability state machine: available, under_option, reserved, sold, rented, unavailable, seasonal.
Cron job for 90-day inactivity auto-archive. Warning 7 days before.
5 investment types: buy_to_let, fix_and_flip, development, commercial_investment, land_banking.
Agricultural family. Crop types, land use, soil quality fields.
Hotelier family. Hotel-specific fields: star_rating, room_count, amenities.
Project family. Link Property to Project. Phase tracking for developments.
Multi-dossier project model: parent_project_id, is_multi_dossier, dossier_count.
Dossier state machine: draft, qualifying, matching, proposed, negotiating, transacting, closed, archived.
Double consent on dossier: C1 demandeur + C2 holder required before match.
Holder decision tracking: pending, favorable, refused. Deadline enforcement.
Rematching on dossier. Count, reason, max 3.
Participant tracking: holder_id, agent_ids, roles. Qualification completion.
Dossier health score and linked entities. Auto-link properties, conversations, visits.
Channel adaptation, SLA priority, NBA, progressive expansion for dossier.
Dossier data scope, privacy controls, doc requirements, completion criteria.
GeographicUnit model 14-level hierarchy. Canonical IDs. Parent-child. GeoJSON.
Full hierarchy: admin (1-5) + operational (6-14). Seed Cameroon: regions, depts, municipalities, cities.
Alias resolution for geo names. Misspellings, historical names, alternative names.
LAWIM-defined zone groupings for agent routing. Zones across admin boundaries.
Geographic scoring 5 distance tiers: same_neighborhood, same_city, same_region, same_country, international.
Mobility modes: walking, car, public_transit, any. Affects proximity radius.
GeographicRelation join table: contains, adjacent, nearby, equivalent, historically_known_as.
Market equivalents for cross-market area comparison.
Complete Cameroon seed: 10 regions, 58 depts, 360 municipalities, 28 cities, 500+ neighborhoods, GPS.
Geo auto-completion and search API. Partial matching, hierarchy drill, multi-language.
Geo-level constraints for search: valid property/transaction types per geographic level.
Geo reference data API: list countries, regions, depts, cities, neighborhoods. Hierarchy browsing.
Match entity + matching algorithm with trigger events. Min 60/100, max 10 results.
5 scoring dimensions: location_match, budget_match, type_match, feature_match, agent_quality. Configurable weights.
Geographic scoring tiers: same_neighborhood=100, same_city=80, same_region=50, same_country=20, international=0.
4 compatibility levels: excellent >=85, good 70-84, average 50-69, low <50. Color coded.
Rematching: triggers (new property, dossier update, expired, declined). Max 3.
Exclusion rules: already_contacted, same_owner, budget_mismatch>50%, location, type.
Transaction success score from historical patterns. 0-100.
Market tension index = demand/supply ratio by type, location, price.
Dossier health score from qualification completeness and data quality.
Property health score from data quality, completeness, freshness. Verification boosts.
9 matching roles: demandeur, holder, agent_demandeur, agent_holder, agency_admin, supervisor, mediator, expert, system.
Progressive search expansion: location, budget+20%, type relax, feature relax.
Continuous market surveillance on new property and availability changes.
Keyword intent classifier for FR, EN, PID. 7+ intents: buy, rent, sell, invest, finance, find, service.
Confidence threshold 0.70 default. Fallback to manual below threshold.
Multi-intent detection: parallel project creation from multiple intents.
Urgency scoring from keywords. Urgency level on Project.
Entity extraction per intent: location, budget, type, size. Auto-populate qualification.
Intent-to-role mapping: buy->demandeur, sell->holder, service->service_seeker.
short_stay PROJECT_TYPE. Sub-type: min_nights, max_nights, seasonal_pricing.
lease (bail 3+ ans) PROJECT_TYPE. timeline_horizon extended to 10 years.
commercial_lease_transfer (cession_bail) project type.
Commercial lease (bail 3-9 ans) as lease sub-type.
business_transfer (cession) project type.
finance PROJECT_TYPE. 10 financing matrices.
find PROJECT_TYPE. Professional search workflow.
service PROJECT_TYPE. Service procurement workflow.
ServiceOrder 8-state lifecycle: created, confirmed, in_progress, completed, cancelled, refunded, disputed, archived.
Payment 10-state machine. Campay integration for MTN/Orange mobile money.
Boost system: 7-day (2K) and 30-day (5K). boost_level and boost_expires_at. Ranking boost.
Premium listing (10K). is_premium field. Premium badge and ranking boost.
Agent Pro subscription (10K/month). Recurring Campay billing. Trial period.
Visit accompaniment ServiceOrder (50K). Linked to Conversation.
Transaction accompaniment ServiceOrder (50K). Document checklist.
Document verification ServiceOrder (5K). Deferred P4.
Professional photography (15K). Media service order origin.
Professional videography (25K). Media service order origin.
Property verification (10K). verification_status and verified_at on Property.
Pay-per-connection (500). LeadPurchase + agent credit. Core monetization.
Personalized assistance (50K). Needs human decision on scope.
Premium visibility (7.5K). Distinct from boost/premium listing.
Property estimation/valuation service with valuation matrix.
Professional expertise/inspection service with checklist.
Document verification workflow.
Visit scheduling service: requested, scheduled, confirmed, completed, cancelled, no_show.
Contre-visite (second visit) type. Linked to initial visit.
Rental management. Recurring model. Full vs referral scope.
Rental listing service with channel distribution.
Sales listing service (for-sale).
Publication service with multi-channel (web, mobile, partner).
Photography service order flow. Media model extension.
Video service order flow. Media model extension.
Drone photography sub-service of photography.
Home staging professional service with staging workflow.
Renovation service. Scope management, milestones.
Construction service. Project management integration.
Maintenance recurring service with scheduling.
Cleaning professional service with scheduling.
Security professional service with guard assignment.
Moving professional service with inventory tracking.
Insurance referral with partner integration.
Legal advice with lawyer network matching.
Tax advice as partner professional service.
Condo management professional service.
Rent recovery dispute resolution service.
Add mason, carpenter, painter to business_profiles.py.
Add tiler, roofer, real estate expert. Expert distinct from agent.
Add appraiser, condo manager, drone videographer.
Add broker, security guard, admin service provider.
Lead packs: Bronze 500/1, Silver 1500/5, Gold 3000/15.
Coordinate unlock (500). Owner contact unlock per property.
Premium seeker profile (1K). Priority features.
Diaspora: Simple 25K, Rapport 50K, Complet 75K.
Agent Business subscription (25K/month). Feature differentiation.
Lead scoring engine: base + boosters - penalties. 0-100 range. Real-time on update.
13 configurable score boosters with weights and caps.
8 configurable score penalties with weights. Floor at 0.
5 lead classes: Hot>=80, Warm 60-79, Warmish 40-59, Cold 20-39, Dead<20.
CRM routing: score-based, zone-based, round-robin. Configurable rules.
7-factor scoring: engagement, recency, frequency, monetary, depth, response, channel.
Behavior tracking: last_activity, login_count, search_count, view_count, contact_count, response_rate.
4-layer anti-fraud: identity, behavior, velocity, blacklist. Auto-suspension.
Post-interaction agent rating 1-5. Recency-weighted average.
Feedback handling: collection, aggregation, reporting. Categories.
Lead SLA by class: Hot=15m, Warm=1h, Warmish=4h, Cold=24h, Dead=48h.
Match consent tracking: demandeur_decision, holder_decision, consent_ids, double_consent_at, deadline.
Proposal workflow: score>=60 and rank<=10 triggers proposal.
Double consent: C1 demandeur, C2 holder. Both required for relationship.
Relationship entity after double consent. Links demandeur, holder, property, agent.
Participant roles: demandeur, holder, agent_demandeur, agent_holder, mediator.
Introduction tracking: method, outcome, assigned agent.
Shared data scope per relationship. Field-level visibility.
Consent lifecycle: requested, granted, active, expired, revoked. Valid transitions.
Revocation by either party. Relationship pause. Notification. Data restriction.
Consent expiration 30 days. Cron check. Re-consent flow.
Idempotency for consent operations. Keys prevent duplicates.
Audit trail for consent changes. Actor, action, timestamp, state.
Human handover: automated -> human agent -> relationship manager.
Matching lifecycle 10 states: created, scored, proposed, demandeur_consented, holder_consented, relationship, active, expired, closed, archived.
Contact lifecycle 6 states: initiated, demandeur_consented, holder_consented, active, closed, archived. Double consent.
Visit lifecycle 9 states: requested, scheduled, confirmed, reminder, in_progress, completed, cancelled, no_show, rescheduled.
Transaction lifecycle 10 states: initiated, offer, negotiation, accepted, docs, signed, payment, completed, cancelled, disputed.
Paid Services & Payment combined lifecycle 18 states. ServiceOrder+Payment integration.
Incident lifecycle 8 states. 12 types, 4 priorities. SLA integration.
Mediation lifecycle 8 states for dispute resolution.
CRM Pipeline 8 stages: lead_in, qualification, proposition, negotiation, closing, won, lost, recycled.
Publication lifecycle 11 states. SIE integration. Multi-channel.
Redirection lifecycle 12 states. Bot/dedup detection.
Conversion & Attribution 12 states. Last-touch attribution.
Agent Invitation 7 states. Secure link. Onboarding steps.
Identity Resolution 5 states. Signal matching for duplicates.
Orchestrator workflow engine. Delegates to sub-workflows: matching, contact, visit, transaction, service.
SLA registry per property type per state. Configurable thresholds.
SLA per workflow state. Duration per entity type.
Priority-based SLA P0-P3. Breach detection and escalation.
Breach detection engine. Configurable check intervals.
3-tier SLA escalation. Configurable actions per tier.
Holder silence escalation. Reminder intervals. Escalate on silence.
NBA per state per workflow. State-specific action registry.
9-level NBA priority. Action-specific assignment.
Follow-up calendar: J1, J7, J30, J90. Auto-reminders.
NBA recalculation on SLA breach events.
Enriched Event: entity_type, entity_id, actor_id, previous/new_state, transition, source, correlation_id, severity, privacy_level, retention_days, metadata, schema_version.
Typed Event Catalog: user.*, property.*, match.*, consent.*, payment.* etc. Schema per type.
Audit trail: actor, action, timestamp, previous/current values, IP, user_agent.
Retention policy per event type. Configurable days. Auto-archive/purge.
Privacy levels: public, internal, restricted, confidential. Access control.
Event consumers registry. Webhooks, queues, consumer groups per type.
Correlation ID for event chains. Links related events.
Event sourcing: append-only log, replay, snapshots.
Event delivery: at-least-once, retry backoff, dead letter queue.
Event monitoring: throughput, error rates, latency, consumer health.
Approval workflow (Niveau 4): approver_role, target_type, status, reviewed_by.
Read permission (Niveau 1). Explicit RBAC read check.
Create permission (Niveau 2). Per-role create matrix.
Edit permission (Niveau 3). Three tiers: own, managed, all.
New REST endpoints for Match, ServiceOrder, Payment, Lead, Visit, Transaction, Relationship, GeographicUnit, Intent, Contact.
API versioning: URL-based /v1/ /v2/. Deprecation headers. Migration guide.
Backward compat layer. V1 endpoints unchanged. Feature flags for V2.
Data migrations: trust level defaults, property family mapping, location data.
Seed migrations: service catalog, qualification matrices, geography data.
State machine migration: map existing project states to new dossier states.
